snippets.description:
ListLocations lists information about the supported locations for this service.
This method can be called in two ways: 

*   **List all public locations: ** Use the path `GET /v1/locations`.
*   **List project-visible locations: ** Use the path
`GET /v1/projects/{project_id}/locations`. This may include public
locations as well as private or other locations specifically visible
to the project.
snippets.title: dataform ListLocations Sample

snippets.description: ListOperations is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: dataform ListOperations Sample

snippets.description: ListReleaseConfigs lists ReleaseConfigs in a given Repository.

snippets.description:
ListRepositories lists Repositories in a given project and location.

**Note: ** *This method can return repositories not shown in the [Dataform
UI](https: //console.cloud.google.com/bigquery/dataform)*.
snippets.title: dataform ListRepositories Sample

snippets.description:
MoveDirectory moves a directory (inside a Workspace), and all of its contents, to a new
location.

snippets.description: MoveFile moves a file (inside a Workspace) to a new location.

snippets.title: dataform MoveFolder Sample

snippets.title: dataform MoveRepository Sample

snippets.description: PushGitCommits pushes Git commits from a Workspace to the Repository's remote.

snippets.description: QueryFolderContents returns the contents of a given Folder.

snippets.description:
QueryRepositoryDirectoryContents returns the contents of a given Repository directory. The Repository must
not have a value for `git_remote_settings.url`.
snippets.title: dataform QueryRepositoryDirectoryContents Sample

snippets.description: QueryTeamFolderContents returns the contents of a given TeamFolder.

snippets.description:
QueryUserRootContents returns the contents of a caller's root folder in a given location.
The root folder contains all resources that are created by the user and not
contained in any other folder.

ReadRepositoryFile returns the contents of a file (inside a Repository). The Repository

snippets.description:
SearchTeamFolders returns all TeamFolders in a given location that the caller has access to

snippets.description:
SetIamPolicy sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any
existing policy.

Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.
snippets.title: dataform SetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description:
TestIamPermissions returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource.
If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of
permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error.

Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware
UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation
may "fail open" without warning.
snippets.title: dataform TestIamPermissions Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateConfig update default config for a given project and location.

**Note: ** *This method does not fully implement
[AIP/134](https: //google.aip.dev/134). The wildcard entry (\*) is treated
as a bad request, and when the `field_mask` is omitted, the request is
treated as a full update on all modifiable fields.*
snippets.title: dataform UpdateConfig Sample
